Radiance of Mysteries Outfit

When the armor wearer receives damage, their spell power, physical and magic armor are increased by 45% for 3 sec., and 192000 health is restored. Stacks up to 3 times. The enemy unit who has attacked the armor wearer is also disarmed for 3 sec., and receives magic damage equal to 75% of the armor wearer's spell power. For 3 sec., the disarmed enemy unit cannot use the weapon abilities. The ability triggers once per 8 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
